pages.text: A focused execution relic for repeated pressure on one enemy.
Repeated direct hits build $(l)Martyr's Claim$() on the same target. When enough stacks are built, the target becomes $(l)Judged$().

Killing a Judged target grants $(l)Haste$() and $(l)Absorption$(), then clears the tracked martyr target. This relic is not about wide cleave; it is about picking one enemy, staying on them, and earning the execution reward.
